Appearances:
Plaintiff Folsom Dore Associates, L.P.,is present. Represented by Emmanuel Zuniga.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chemine Westphala is present.
Attorney Ruth Desmond representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Conroy, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Aug -13-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
